[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110100 3
1 0110011100 5
2 0010000000 1
3 0000100001 2
4 0101101110 6
5 0011011100 5
6 1010110011 6
7 1111000010 5

24 1110111111 9
35 1111111111 a
46 1111011001 7
